observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with staining or fungal
Visual pattern suggesting color variation or stain
Localized deviation from normal wood appearance
mechanism_explanation: Environmental exposure causes discoloration through staining or fungal growth.
severity_visual_description: minor color variation or stain visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Control storage humidity and improve ventilation.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the color variation or stain would be absent and surface appears normal.
